positive: Minimalist, high-contrast silhouette illustration of a mountain range meeting a dramatic aurora borealis sky. The composition should be centered, featuring clean, scalable black ink silhouettes against a vibrant, gradient background of deep blues, teals, and cosmic purples. Stylize it with geometric celestial elements like stylized stars and crescent moons. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, highly detailed linework, flat graphic design aesthetic, deep saturation, crisp lines, clean composition, vibrant print art.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, poor contrast, realistic photography, gradients (unless specified), messy background
